author: Lisa Bayfield
content: We have used Little Monsters Event Hire for the last few years for our school Summer Fair. Joanne is always incredibly helpful and patient with providing quotes, suggesting things that may work, putting together a package that never fails to disappoint. We always find something new to have to keep things fresh. Last year it was the sweeper which was a huge success but everything is enjoyed. The people who come on the day are always punctual, professional and polite. Overall everyone is a delight to work with. Thank you Little Monsters.
